title: About Copyright News
subtitle: An independent digital publication documenting the intersection of technology, intellectual property, and creator culture.
mission_text: We exist to provide context in an era of rapid digital transformation. From groundbreaking AI developments and shifting copyright laws to the creators redefining entertainment, our goal is to deliver honest journalism, thoughtful analysis, and stories that matter to the digital economy.
story_text:
Founded in 2026, Copyright News emerged from a simple observation: the digital world was moving faster than traditional media could keep up. We built a platform that moves at the speed of the internet without sacrificing depth, accuracy, or editorial independence.

What started as a niche newsletter has grown into a full-fledged publication read by thousands of industry professionals, creators, and technologists worldwide.

values.title: Independence
values.text: We are not owned by any corporation, platform, or agency. Our editorial decisions are our own, ensuring unbiased coverage of the tech and creator landscapes.

values.title: Depth
values.text: We prioritize understanding over speed. When we cover a story, we aim to provide the historical and legal context you won't find in breaking news feeds.

values.title: Community
values.text: We believe in open source, transparency, and giving back. Our tools and platform are built with the creator community in mind.
